title: Non-record: O(n) field LM, 2L FP16 (no attention)
body:
Non-record submission of PipeOwl-1.8-jp-parameter-golf.

repo:[PipeOwl-1.8-jp-parameter-golf](https://huggingface.co/WangKaiLin/PipeOwl-1.8-jp-parameter-golf)

This work explores a field-based language model with linear-time scoring, without attention or transformer weights.

Focus is on alternative structure rather than benchmark performance.

comments.body: You need a val_bpb to submit a non record submission!

Thanks! I've added a preliminary val_bpb evaluation to the README.

Current result:
val_bpb ≈ 21.42

Also included a simple evaluation script:
https://huggingface.co/WangKaiLin/PipeOwl-1.8.1-jp-evalbpb
